entry.title: The Jason-Pussy Portal
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,709Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 137

Summary: Signing up for the Pussy Sharing Program could turn out to be a mistake, Jason thinks. The soft leather chastity belt around Jason’s crotch chafes against his skin. The crotch piece is molded perfectly to the shape of his pubis, so that no matter how much he moves, the mouth of the portal will always cover his sex, giving his user full access to his pussy and clit. Jason has no access to his own genitals at all—which means no touching, no masturbating, no pleasuring himself twenty-four-seven. That honor solely belongs to whoever holds the other end of the Jason-Pussy—the Anonymous User he signed his autonomy to.

entry.title: Big Brother
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,230Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: He can no longer remember his name. The way things vibrate around him—the taps of footsteps, the clanking of tools—make the room feel like a tiny space. Perhaps something squarish with only ventilation and no windows. He is hooked up to the wall and mattress with chains and straps. A straitjacket keeps his arms pinned around his torso and secured behind him. On the bottom, he wears nothing except for the dildos thrusting into him. The man who comes to tend to him has a handsome face and a gorgeous smile. The man he only knows as Big Brother.

entry.title: Gimme All You Got (I Can Take It)
entry.summary:
Author: Starless_Void

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,575Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 152

Summary: Jason returns to Gotham a year after his showdown with Bruce and the Joker. He hopes to lie under the radar for a bit while he builds up a cleaner reputation for the Red Hood in the Narrows. Dick lost Jason once to the Joker, then a second time to Bruce's morals. When he gets word that Jason has returned to Gotham while Batman and Robin are on a deep space mission, Dick seizes the opportunity to reconnect with his protege, hoping to fix their bond and in the process, fix himself. Losing Bludhaven was a hard blow, and learning that Jason had been so close only to be lost to them again broke something in Dick that he hasn't been able to fix. Can Jason handle finally having someone who will always choose him first, or will he suffocate under Dick's possessive tendencies and need for constant control? Can Dick break through Jason's walls and bring his little wing back into the fold, or will he push too hard and force Jason away for good?

entry.title: Implanted Pussy Vibrator
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,248Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 59

Summary: Jason, unconscious, head bandaged and bleeding from a recent head wound, lies on a makeshift stainless steel table that Dick cleaned and sterilized. He is completely naked, sprawling. Dick had stripped him down to nothing, not even shoes. Between his splayed, shapely thighs, the slit of his pussy can be seen spreading, giving a glimpse of the rosiness underneath. “I’ve lost sleep over this,” Dick says to no one in particular, looking almost penitent in his uniform and mask, holding what looks like a chain of silicone beads. “But… I’ll have to go through with it. I think it’s for the best.”

entry.title: Baby Bun-Bun
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,233Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 42

Summary: Jason had to grow up fast as a street bunny and was further thrust into serious “adult” life when he became Robin. Dick used to whine about how he’d missed out on the best years of raising his bunny brother. Now that Dick’s dream is finally coming true, he insists on bottle-feeding Jason. It makes Dick feel better, Jason thinks, about having missed out on Jason’s life before Jason died. “Just because you’re grown now doesn’t mean I can’t pamper you,” Dick used to say to him, scritching behind Jason’s ear. Jason would clatter his teeth in a baby bunny purr, and Dick would show his appreciation with a head scritch and a forehead stroke.

entry.title: Birds of Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Castle53

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,865Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Jason Todd was expecting an interesting year. He wasn't expecting his entire past to be thrown into his lap, but what can you do? Dick's been missing for two years. Even he doesn't know where he was. But he killed them all. Tim never thought of Bruce as a good father, but he never thought the man would stoop this far. Roy wants to get out of heroism, thank you very much. Arthur Fleck started the year with one adopted son, and now he's got four. Fantastic.

entry.title: a grave in the sky (where it's roomy to lie)
entry.summary:
Author: svalas

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,022Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 383

Summary: Nightwing stood up, and the expression on his face made Spoiler step back nervously. His hand unfurled, shaking, revealing a sharp and bloody switchblade. “Somebody was here.” If his voice went any tighter it might shatter. “And we were too late.” (Again, he added in his mind. Then he flinched and had to remind himself—it’s not Jason. Jason’s dead.)or, what might have happened in UTRH if Black Mask was just a bit smarter
